case_title: JONES, MICHAEL PATRICK VS WASHINGTON MUTUAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY JONES, MICHAEL PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-25-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-27-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, MICHAEL PATRICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL THE CLAIM IS AMENDED TO REFLECT DEFENDANT'S CORRECT NAME: WASHINGTON MUTUAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO MICHAEL PATRICK JONES RETURNED; ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN;
